text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One winter holiday...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: What?! Santa doesn't bring you any presents?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
No way! Grandma always told me Santa definitely
comes if you're good and work hard!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You know what? I'm gonna prove that Santa
comes!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
First, we gotta write a letter! We'll tell him just
how good you've been!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Like, take today for example. You worked pretty
hard, right? That's the kinda thing we gotta write
down!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like Sweep Tosho is doing what she can to
brighten up the holidays for me, so I try to match
her enthusiasm and play along.
choice_data_list: Okay, I'll give it a shot!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
This is terrible! F minus! Do it properly! Write
about how you log our progress every day or how
you always get ready earlier than me every
morning!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Do it again! I'm not letting you off the hook until
you do it right!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like Sweep Tosho has noticed things I do
that I never even realized myself. I happily write a
new letter.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hmph... Well, I guess this one is passable. Not
like we have much time, so it'll have to do!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Now we just gotta put it in the mail and wait. Or...
actually, I've got a better way. Follow me!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Okay, which one of these pine trees is the
tallest?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I'll stick it up top so Santa will see it when he flies
over!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't want to let her do anything too dangerous.
I try to persuade her, saying he'll be too busy
delivering presents to notice a letter on a tree.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh... Yeah, you might be right. But how do we
get your letter to him, then?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I've got it! You know how I've always got you
running all over as my familiar?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I'll just have you go to the North Pole too.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
In that case, you can just meet Santa in person!
Plus, that way you can show him how hard you
worked just by visiting him. Is that a good idea or
what?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
All right, Familiar! Start jumping! I'll use my magic
to make you fly!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As instructed, I keep jumping until the sun starts
to set...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, I never manage to take flight and
Santa never shows up... We have no choice but to
go back to campus.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: What the heck?! Why didn't he come?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Grandma said he would! She said Santa visits
people who work hard!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I mean, he comes to see me every year... He tells
me how hard I've been working and gives me
magical items and grimoires!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
And yet he doesn't come visit my familiar? What
gives?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Santa's so stupid!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't help but feel warm inside after hearing the
reason why she was so intent on making this
happen.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Well, if this is how it's gonna be, we'll call Santa
next year! We can let him have an earful about
today!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You need to keep working hard next year so I can
make my case. Got it?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If I'm with Sweep Tosho, I might actually get to
meet Santa someday. And I believe that from the
bottom of my heart.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
What are you smiling about?! Aren't you annoyed
with Santa too?!
choice_data_list: I'm just happy you've noticed my hard work.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If today is just the day Sweep acknowledges my
year's worth of hard work, that's more than good
enough for me. Certainly better than anything
Santa could give me.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
What are you talking about?! There's more to life
than me noticing you! Come on!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
But, seeing how it's the holidays and all, I guess I
can do something for you. You did good work
today, Familiar! For once!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I guess I can give you this magical present too! It's
super special!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Pear tree healing! Rest with divine protection!
Here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho grabs my phone from me and turns
it off!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe! ♪ Now you can enjoy the holidays
without anyone or anything bothering you!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
And now... oh! I know this place that's enchanted
with light magic where we can walk around!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Then let's go eat some shortcake! I'll take all the
strawberries for you! Their magic is a little
stronger than you can handle!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The glittering illuminations look even more
dazzling than normal as we spend a wonderful
holiday together walking beneath them.
